_comment: Operator values for the legal pages. Empty string = the {{PLACEHOLDER}} stays visible on the page. Fill before go-live and build with STRICT_PLACEHOLDERS=1 to fail if any placeholder is still unfilled. These details are legally required to be public on the site.
AUFSICHTSBEHOERDE: Der Hessische Beauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit, Postfach 31 63, 65021 Wiesbaden (datenschutz.hessen.de)
